message:
feat(tests): expand module compatibility matrix, add dependency isolation contract, and apply test suite rustfmt

Module compatibility matrix expansion:
- Add 6 new compatibility cases: wildcard exports precedence, unexported
  subpath fail-closed, exports target package-root escape rejection,
  external package relative traversal escape, bare require index.mjs
  package-root anchoring, and require-of-ESM/extensionless-relative
  observer variants
- Full cross-mode (Native/NodeCompat/BunCompat) test coverage for each case
- Update module_compatibility_matrix_v1.json contract with new entries

Cross-repo dependency isolation:
- Add CROSS_REPO_DEPENDENCY_ISOLATION_V1.md documenting the asupersync
  tripod (franken-kernel, franken-decision, franken-evidence) strategy
- Add cross_repo_dependency_isolation_v1.json structured contract
- Tests verify contract matches Cargo.toml feature gates and build-gate
  script references

Test suite cleanup:
- Apply consistent rustfmt formatting across ~55 integration and conformance
  test files (same serde_json chain collapse pattern as source files)
- Normalize import ordering in generator_semantics and spread_operator tests
- Add interpreter config fields (max_heap_objects, max_total_memory_bytes)
  to integration test configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@
+# Cross-Repo Dependency Isolation (`bd-6a61n.6`)
+
+Canonical contract for FrankenEngine's `/dp` sibling dependencies, standalone build
+mode, and full-integration verification posture.
+
+## Scope
+
+`frankenengine-engine` currently carries one external dependency family behind a
+feature gate:
+
+- `/dp/asupersync/franken_kernel`
+- `/dp/asupersync/franken_decision`
+- `/dp/asupersync/franken_evidence`
+
+These dependencies are optional at the Cargo layer but enabled by default
+through the `asupersync-integration` feature so the repo can run in two explicit
+build modes instead of one ambiguous hybrid.
+
+## Dependency Manifest
+
+The canonical dependency manifest is:
+
+- `docs/cross_repo_dependency_isolation_v1.json`
+
+That JSON contract records the external package keys, repo paths, feature gate,
+approved boundary files, imported symbols, verification scripts, and operator
+commands.
+
+## Feature Gate and Build Modes
+
+`crates/franken-engine/Cargo.toml` defines:
+
+- default feature set: `["asupersync-integration"]`
+- gated sibling dependencies: `franken-kernel`, `franken-decision`,
+  `franken-evidence`
+
+The supported operator build modes are:
+
+- standalone mode:
+  `cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --no-default-features`
+- standalone test mode:
+  `cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --no-default-features`
+- full integration mode:
+  `cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --all-features`
+
+Standalone mode is the blocking portability gate. Full integration mode verifies
+the sibling-backed control-plane surface when the `/dp/asupersync` tripod is
+available.
+
+## Verification Surfaces
+
+Two RC-6 operator surfaces are normative:
+
+- `./scripts/audit_external_deps.sh`
+- `./scripts/test_standalone_build.sh ci`
+
+The audit script enumerates `/dp` path dependencies, records boundary metadata,
+and optionally uses `rch` to verify each sibling crate. The build-gate script
+records the standalone and full-integration outcomes and fails closed on local
+fallbacks. These exact invocations are the canonical operator commands recorded
+in `docs/cross_repo_dependency_isolation_v1.json`.
+
+## Artifacts
+
+The dependency audit writes:
+
+- `artifacts/dependency_audit/manifest.json`
+- `artifacts/dependency_audit/commands.txt`
+- `artifacts/dependency_audit/logs/`
+
+The standalone/full-integration build gate writes:
+
+- `artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/manifest.json`
+- `artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/events.jsonl`
+- `artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/commands.txt`
+- `artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/step_logs/`
+
+The JSON contract pins these artifact names so the scripts, docs, and
+regression tests all agree on the same evidence bundle layout.
+
+## RCH-Only Operator Commands
+
+Heavy Rust verification for this lane must stay remote:
+
+```bash
+./scripts/audit_external_deps.sh
+./scripts/test_standalone_build.sh ci
+```
+
+Both scripts are expected to route heavy Cargo commands through `rch`.

@@ -0,0 +1,120 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "franken-engine.cross-repo-dependency-isolation.contract.v1",
+  "bead_id": "bd-6a61n.6",
+  "component": "cross_repo_dependency_isolation",
+  "workspace_crate": "frankenengine-engine",
+  "cargo_toml": "crates/franken-engine/Cargo.toml",
+  "feature_gates": [
+    {
+      "feature": "asupersync-integration",
+      "default_enabled": true,
+      "enables_dependencies": [
+        "franken-kernel",
+        "franken-decision",
+        "franken-evidence"
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "dependencies": [
+    {
+      "dependency_key": "franken-kernel",
+      "crate_module": "franken_kernel",
+      "repo_path": "/dp/asupersync/franken_kernel",
+      "feature_gate": "asupersync-integration",
+      "approved_boundary_files": [
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/control_plane/mod.rs"
+      ],
+      "imported_symbols": [
+        "Budget",
+        "CapabilitySet",
+        "Cx",
+        "DecisionId",
+        "NoCaps",
+        "PolicyId",
+        "SchemaVersion",
+        "TraceId"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "dependency_key": "franken-decision",
+      "crate_module": "franken_decision",
+      "repo_path": "/dp/asupersync/franken_decision",
+      "feature_gate": "asupersync-integration",
+      "approved_boundary_files": [
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/control_plane/mod.rs",
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/safety_decision_router.rs"
+      ],
+      "imported_symbols": [
+        "DecisionContract",
+        "DecisionOutcome",
+        "EvalContext",
+        "FallbackPolicy",
+        "LossMatrix",
+        "Posterior",
+        "evaluate"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "dependency_key": "franken-evidence",
+      "crate_module": "franken_evidence",
+      "repo_path": "/dp/asupersync/franken_evidence",
+      "feature_gate": "asupersync-integration",
+      "approved_boundary_files": [
+        "crates/franken-engine/src/control_plane/mod.rs"
+      ],
+      "imported_symbols": [
+        "EvidenceLedger",
+        "EvidenceLedgerBuilder"
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "build_modes": {
+    "standalone": {
+      "commands": [
+        "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --no-default-features",
+        "cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --no-default-features"
+      ],
+      "description": "Compile and test the engine without the default asupersync integration feature."
+    },
+    "full_integration": {
+      "commands": [
+        "cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --all-features"
+      ],
+      "description": "Verify the sibling-backed control-plane surface with the asupersync tripod present."
+    }
+  },
+  "verification_surfaces": {
+    "dependency_audit": {
+      "script": "./scripts/audit_external_deps.sh",
+      "operator_command": "./scripts/audit_external_deps.sh",
+      "artifact_root": "artifacts/dependency_audit",
+      "manifest_schema_version": "franken-engine.external-dependency-audit.v1",
+      "artifacts": [
+        "manifest.json",
+        "commands.txt",
+        "logs/"
+      ]
+    },
+    "standalone_build_gate": {
+      "script": "./scripts/test_standalone_build.sh",
+      "operator_command": "./scripts/test_standalone_build.sh ci",
+      "artifact_root": "artifacts/standalone_build_gate",
+      "manifest_schema_version": "franken-engine.standalone-build-gate.v1",
+      "artifacts": [
+        "<timestamp>/manifest.json",
+        "<timestamp>/events.jsonl",
+        "<timestamp>/commands.txt",
+        "<timestamp>/step_logs/"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "operator_verification": [
+    "./scripts/audit_external_deps.sh",
+    "./scripts/test_standalone_build.sh ci",
+    "cat artifacts/dependency_audit/manifest.json",
+    "cat artifacts/dependency_audit/commands.txt",
+    "cat artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/manifest.json",
+    "cat artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/events.jsonl",
+    "cat artifacts/standalone_build_gate/<timestamp>/commands.txt"
+  ]
+}

@@ -122,6 +122,41 @@
         "migration_guidance": "Prefer explicit `.cjs` or `.js` require targets, or an exports map that exposes a CommonJS branch for the scoped package; use bun_compat only when Bun-style bare `.mjs` entry probing is an intentional compatibility requirement."
       }
     },
+    {
+      "case_id": "bare-require-package-index-mjs-relative-import-package-root",
+      "feature": "cjs",
+      "scenario": "After Bun-style bare CommonJS require probes an external package `index.mjs` entry, nested relative imports must stay anchored at the package root instead of a synthetic entry-file directory.",
+      "node_behavior": "reject_mjs_package_entry_probe",
+      "bun_behavior": "resolve_relative_import_from_package_root_after_mjs_probe",
+      "franken_native_behavior": "reject_mjs_package_entry_probe",
+      "franken_node_compat_behavior": "reject_mjs_package_entry_probe",
+      "franken_bun_compat_behavior": "resolve_relative_import_from_package_root_after_mjs_probe",
+      "explicit_shims": [
+        {
+          "shim_id": "shim-bun-bare-require-index-mjs-package-root-v1",
+          "mode": "bun_compat",
+          "description": "Explicit Bun-compatible `.mjs` package-entry probe that preserves package-root anchoring for nested relative imports after the sync bridge accepts the external entry.",
+          "removable": true,
+          "test_case_ref": "lockstep/module/bare-require-package-index-mjs-relative-import-package-root"
+        }
+      ],
+      "lockstep_case_refs": [
+        "lockstep/module/bare-require-package-index-mjs-relative-import-package-root",
+        "lockstep/module/scoped-bare-require-package-index-mjs-relative-import-package-root"
+      ],
+      "test262_refs": [
+        "language/module-code/instn-star-props-circular.js"
+      ],
+      "divergence": {
+        "diverges_from": [
+          "bun"
+        ],
+        "reason": "Native and node-compatible loaders fail closed on bare require() `.mjs` package-entry probing, so they never reach the nested relative-import chain that Bun-style bridging resolves from the package root.",
+        "impact": "Packages that rely on Bun's external `index.mjs` require bridge must preserve package-root-relative dependency anchoring once the bridge is enabled; other modes remain unresolved before that step.",
+        "waiver_id": "waiver-modcomp-bare-require-index-mjs-package-root-bun",
+        "migration_guidance": "Prefer explicit `.cjs` or `.js` require targets, or an exports map with a CommonJS branch; if bun_compat is required, pin tests that prove nested relative imports stay rooted at the package root."
+      }
+    },
     {
       "case_id": "conditional-exports-condition-order",
       "feature": "conditional_exports",
